title: Dreams of Love
writer: René Fauchois, Jean Ferry, Christian Stengel
actors: Pierre Richard-Willm, Mila Parély, Annie Ducaux
plot: The story follows Franz Liszt from his time as an intense young music teacher in Paris, to his blossoming as a piano virtuoso and his infatuation for the Countess Marie D'Agoult, married and the mother of two young girls. She leav...
